title: Expecting read-only properties to be ignored when creating a MAGAZINE ISSUE
gherkin:
When the user creates a "MAGAZINE ISSUE" "Sieger-Typen" with the following data
  | key | value | datatype |
  | title | Sieger-Typen | string |
  | consecutive_number |  | number |
  | issue_number | 11 | number |
  | issue_year | 2025 | number |
  | release_date | 2025-10-01 | string |
  | single_copy_price | 5.4 | number |
  | single_copy_price_unit | € | string |
  | pages | 148 | number |
  | id         | 1234       | number   |
  | created_at | 2025-01-01 | string   |
  | updated_at | 2025-01-01 | string   |
Then the response should contain the following keys
  | key        |
  | id         |
  | created_at |
  | updated_at |
But the response should NOT contain the following properties
  | key        | value      | datatype |
  | id         | 1234       | number   |
  | created_at | 2025-01-01 | string   |
  | updated_at | 2025-01-01 | string   |
